cn.releaseNotes:
NEW

We've redesigned the Genius Scan account settings view to make it easier to review your subscription plan and manage your account.

The settings also include a new Genius Cloud sync view with clearer sync status and a more guided setup.

Lastly, to help you preserve your scanned documents, Genius Scan will remind you from time to time if you have many documents and haven’t set up any automated backup (such as Genius Cloud or Auto-Export).

IMPROVED

- Export status is now always visible in the document toolbar so you know at a glance whether a document was exported or not.
- Better support for large text sizes across lists and settings.

FIXED

- Fixed a crash that could occur when deleting a Genius Cloud account.
- Multiple refinements to the sync reminder and onboarding flow.

Genius Scan now requires iOS 17 or later.
cn.description:
Genius Scan是一款可装入口袋的扫描仪。 可随时随地快速扫描文档，并能导出为JPEG或多页PDF文件。

*** Apple App of the Week *** 2000多万用户 *** 1000多家小企业 ***

将任何文档放在设备的相机前面：我们的扫描仪应用程序会自动识别背景纸张，裁剪纸张并清理结果。您可以获得清晰易读的扫描。批量扫描可让您在几秒钟内扫描数十页。强大的工具可帮助您组织、共享或归档文档。

“这是一款绝对精彩的应用。” -  AppSafari.com

“下一次出差时别忘了下载一个 Genius Scan，可以给自己和会计部门带来很大方便。” -  AppPicker.com

==企业版== 

 Genius Scan+ Premium Pack： 

 - 开箱即用（无需升级）Genius Scan+ 的所有高级功能（用下方的 + 表示）。 

管理配置： 

 - 部署到由MDM工具管理的设备中
 - 按用户预先配置部署应用程序设置（例如，设置默认电子邮件地址，WebDAV / FTP 凭据） 
 - 控制用户可以将文档导出到哪些应用程序和服务
 - 无广告

==主要功能== 

智能扫描： 

 - 文件检测和背景移除
 - 失真校正
 - 阴影去除和缺陷清理
 - 滤镜（黑白、白板、照片） 
 - 批量扫描

 PDF创建和编辑： 

 - 文档合并和拆分
 - 多页PDF创建
 - 照片和PDF导入

安全和隐私： 

 - 设备上文档处理
 + 面容_ID 
 + PDF密码加密

文件组织： 

 - 文档标记
 - 元数据和内容搜索
 + 自定义命名方案（智能文档名称） 
 + 使用Genius Cloud进行备份和多设备同步（单独订阅） 

导出：

 - 电子邮件
 + Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV. 
 + 任何与WebDAV兼容的服务，例如Citrix ShareFile、NextCloud、ownCloud、Synology、Yandex。 
 + 自动后台自动导出

OCR（文本识别）：

 + 文字提取
 + 创建可搜索的PDF
 + 扫描名片和创建联系人

==关于我们== 

The Grizzly Labs在法国巴黎市中心开发了Genius Scan。我们制作能够帮助全世界数百万用户的应用程序并在质量和隐私方面保持最高标准，我们为此感到自豪。如果您有任何疑问，请通过@thegrizzlylabs联系我们。

==定价和法律==

您可以订阅Genius Cloud进行备份和同步。在这种情况下，Genius Scan的商店会显示每个订阅的持续时间和价格，并在购买时更新。订单确认后，将从iTunes帐户中收取付款。除非在当前期间结束前24小时内关闭自动续订，否则订阅会自动续订。管理订阅，禁用iTunes帐户设置中的自动续订。

https://www.thegrizzlylabs.com/genius-scan/cloud/terms

无论您是专业作家、医生、律师、残疾人或因某种原因无法使用传统打字的人，语音转文本：语音转文本应用程序将迅速解决您的转录问题并帮助您实现今天的写作目标！

--上班挂机 下班回收--
开启自动挂机激战，狂刷神装一键回收。

--幸运大爆 无限刷BOSS--
野外BOSS随机刷新，十倍攻速触发幸运大爆，神级装备捡不停。

--跨服战斗 巅峰争霸--
率领大魔军迅速占领玛雅神殿，巅峰争霸大战一触即发！

发现元素周期表的全新世界，尽在我们创新的3D应用中！沉浸在全新、视觉上令人惊叹的元素世界中。我们的应用提供极简和引人入胜的体验，使探索元素周期表成为一次独特而引人入胜的旅程。

通过我们直观的界面和极简设计，您可以轻松浏览各个元素。每个元素在引人入胜的3D环境中栩栩如生，让您以前所未有的方式可视化其结构。观察元素如何相互作用，以全新的视角揭示它们的性质。

想要了解特定元素更多吗？我们的应用提供有关每个元素的详细且易于理解的信息，涵盖从其物理和化学性质到历史和实际用途的所有方面。学习元素周期表从未如此易于获取和令人兴奋。

我们的应用非常适合学生、专业人士和科学爱好者。无论您是学习化学还是只是对元素世界感到好奇，我们的3D应用都提供了一种教育性和富有娱乐性的体验。

立即下载，沉浸在元素周期表之美中，以前所未有的方式探索、学习并着迷！

告别混乱的纸笔记录！ ScoreMaster 是一款专为桌游与卡牌玩家打造的万用 App。为你省去繁琐计算，100% 专注于游戏乐趣。

完美支援各类热门游戏：

经典桌游：卡坦岛 (Catan)、卡卡颂 (Carcassonne)、魔力桥 (Rummikub)

卡牌与扑克：扑克牌、魔法风云会 (MTG)、宝可梦卡牌 (PTCG)、游戏王

派对与阵营：狼人杀、阿瓦隆、Codenames

角色扮演：龙与地下城 (D&D) 及各类自订计分游戏

六大核心功能一览：

直觉计分： 支援多玩家，一键快速加减分，介面清爽不中断。

战绩纪录： 自动储存每局最终分数与历史对战纪录。

起始玩家抽选： 多人触控萤幕，一秒随机抽出开局玩家。

随机掷骰子： 内建虚拟骰子，随点随掷，忘记带配件也不怕。

倒数计时器： 自订沙漏时间，派对限时问答必备。

对战计时器： 双人专用回合码表，告别长考，比赛更公平。

cn.description:
【婚启 - 让每一份爱都有完美的开始】
婚启是一款专为备婚情侣设计的协同婚礼筹备管理工具，帮助你在一个 App 中，和伴侣一起，集中管理婚礼相关的任务、时间安排、回忆记录和预算信息。

【核心功能】
智能日历规划
• 首页展示婚礼倒计时，重要日期一目了然
• 任务与日历深度联动，筹备进度可视化
• 吉日智能推荐，帮您决策婚礼日期

任务管理系统
• 15大分类任务覆盖婚礼全流程：场地、餐饮、摄影、服饰...
• 根据婚礼日期自动排期，动态调整优先级
• 伴侣任务协同，双方进度实时同步

预算智能管控
• 分类预算设置，支出记录一键添加
• 支持定金、尾款分别记录
• 支出统计复盘，超预算智能预警

回忆时光轴
• 图片视频随心记录，备婚点滴永久保存
• 时间轴浏览模式,甜蜜瞬间时刻回顾
• 仅与伴侣分享，打造专属回忆录

【备婚工具包】
• 礼金簿：按亲友维度记录送出和收到的礼金，掌握收支情况
• 座位表：高效的婚礼宴会座位编排，支持座位表导出
• 亲友管理：礼金簿和座位表共享一套亲友名单，避免重复录入

【免费功能 vs 婚启会员】
免费用户可使用以下核心功能：
• 恋爱阶段 & 策划阶段备婚任务
• 基础预算管理（使用系统规划的预算分类）
• 回忆记录（图片/视频/文字，无数量限制）
• 日历与任务提醒
• 支出记录（最多6笔）、礼金记录（最多6笔）
• 亲友管理（最多10人）
• 座位表（最多2张桌）

升级婚启会员，解锁全部高级功能：
• 筹备阶段 & 确认阶段任务——完整覆盖婚前冲刺与最终确认的全部事项
• 无限支出记录 & 无限礼金记录
• 亲友管理人数无上限
• 座位表无桌数限制，无导出限制
• 自定义任务 & 自定义预算分类
（配对伴侣可共享会员权益）

会员方案：月度订阅 / 季度订阅 / 永久会员（一次性买断）

【订阅与自动续费说明】
• 订阅周期：1个月（月度会员），3个月（季度会员）
• 订阅价格：月度会员为每月9.9元；季度会员为每3个月19.9元
• 付款：通过用户的iTunes账户扣款，用户确认购买后即付款。
• 取消续订：如需取消续订，请在当前订阅周期到期前24小时以前，手动在iTunes/Apple ID设置管理中关闭自动续订功能。在当前订阅周期内，仍可继续使用会员功能。
• 续订：苹果iTunes账户会在到期前24小时内扣费，扣费成功后订阅周期顺延一个订阅周期。
• Terms of Use (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
• 隐私协议：https://www.feilinggu.com/wp/legal/privacy_policy.html

【为什么选择婚启】
• 专为中国备婚情侣设计 - 从选婚期、预算到四大金刚、酒店预定，备婚全流程任务指引
• 情侣协同 - 双方账户互联，任务分工清晰，共用一套预算
• 数据可视化 - 进度、预算、时间线，所有信息一目了然
• 隐私安全 - 只为两个人设计，所有数据不公开、不分享

从相遇到相伴，从求婚到婚礼，愿每一份爱都有完美的开始


—— 婚启团队
期待与你一起启程

cn.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

# Support & Legal #
For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact:
Customer Support:
suporte.codigoazul@gmail.com

Privacy Policy:
https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/privacy

End User License Agreement (EULA):
https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/eula

Burgle your way to adventure in the award-winning board game!


A New Adventure Begins!
Clank!, the iconic deck-building board game adventure, challenges daring thieves to sneak into a dragon’s lair, steal one of her precious artifacts, and escape – before you’re roasted to a crisp!
Winning fans and awards around the world, Clank! is one of the most-beloved modern board games, with a wide range of expansions and adaptations for players to enjoy.

How Deep will you Delve?
The deeper you go, the more valuable treasures you’ll find…but the harder it will be to escape! So be quick and be quiet: One false step and – CLANK! Each careless sound risks drawing the dragon’s attention.
You’re competing against your fellow thieves to claim the most valuable prize…but you can only enjoy your loot if you make it out of the depths alive!


Choose Your Path

Blending deck-building and exploration, Clank! offers a unique dungeon-delving adventure each time you play."


Many Ways to Play
Learn the ropes in a guided Tutorial, then hone your abilities by collecting Achievements and completing Challenges. Play cross-platform against friends, or compete in exciting new Heists that put you up against players from around the world!

However you choose to enter the dungeon: Good luck!...you’re going to need it!

在我们创新的3D应用中，发现元素周期表的全新世界！沉浸在全新、视觉上令人惊叹的元素世界中。我们的应用提供极简和引人入胜的体验，使探索元素周期表成为一次独特而引人入胜的旅程。

通过我们直观的界面和极简设计，您可以轻松浏览各个元素。每个元素在引人入胜的3D环境中栩栩如生，让您以前所未有的方式可视化其结构。观察元素如何相互作用，以全新的视角揭示它们的性质。

想要了解特定元素更多吗？我们的应用提供有关每个元素的详细且易于理解的信息，涵盖从其物理和化学性质到历史和实际用途的所有方面。学习元素周期表从未如此易于获取和令人兴奋。

我们的应用非常适合学生、专业人士和科学爱好者。无论您是学习化学还是只是对元素世界感到好奇，我们的3D应用都提供了一种教育性和富有娱乐性的体验。

立即下载，沉浸在元素周期表之美中，以前所未有的方式探索、学习并着迷！

hk.releaseNotes:
The shadows over Hue County grow darker in the wake of a shocking murder.

Step into the elegant Noir Mansion and interrogate six suspects too sharp for their own good. They'll point fingers in every direction and offer up promises of honesty. 

But you know better. Trust nothing but your clue sheet...

Could it have been Crime Reporter Scarlett with the Mini Revolver? Maybe Private Detective Mustard used the "Civil War" Musket with Bayonet? Did Risk Analyst Plum turn himself into a liability with the Billiard Stick, or perhaps Lawyer Peacock cracked with the Meat Tenderiser. Did Signature Forger White sign off Boddy's death with the Silver Candelabra? Or maybe Con Artist Green phoned in a deadly performance with the Rotary Phone... 

With the Noir Mansion crime scene, you can toggle the special Noir filter at any time during your game! See the mansion in its full-colour glory, or drench it in deep, cinematic shadows. 

You'll also unlock Noir-themed cosmetics to dress up in true vintage style!

INCLUDES:
- A BRAND-NEW CRIME SCENE – The highly requested film-noir theme arrives in Clue/Cluedo!
- THEMED COSMETICS – This crime scene includes a new player avatar, a different card back, a themed clue sheet, a sleek dice set and 12 new tokens.
- MORE STORY TO EXPLORE – Delve into the murky backstories of each suspect and uncover their motives.
hk.description:
Join fellow detectives all over the world in the official digital board game version of Clue/Cluedo! Gather crucial evidence, interrogate suspects and solve the original murder mystery.

Follow Miss Scarlett, Colonel Mustard, Professor Plum, Chef White, Solicitor Peacock and Mayor Green through the iconic Tudor Mansion, unlocking their motives and alibis as you go. 

Enjoy Clue/Cluedo the way you remember it in Classic Mode, or jump in for a quick game with Clue Cards mode. Alternatively, if you want to really test your sleuthing skills, try a new investigation format available exclusively to Clue/Cluedo – Ultimate Detective.

In Ultimate Detective Mode, everyone answers suggestions at the same time…but secretly! 

Face your suspects in a direct interrogation as you rely on your skills of deduction to get to the truth. Experience the mystery, solve the murder and become a top-tier detective!

HOW TO PLAY CLUE/CLUEDO: 

1. Three cards are dealt face-down and set aside – this is the solution to the crime!
2. Everyone is dealt three Clue Cards. These are automatically crossed off your clue sheet, as they can’t be part of the solution. 
3. Roll the dice and move around the board. 
4. When you enter a room, you can make a suggestion – select who you think the murderer is, what weapon they used and where the crime happened. 
5. Other players will then aim to disprove your suggestion; if one of your suggestions matches a card in their hand, they show you that card to disprove it. 
6. Use your clue sheet to keep track of which characters, weapons and rooms have been disproven. 
7. Think you’ve figured it out? It’s time to make an accusation! Be careful though – if you’re right, you win, but if you are wrong, you’re out! 

FEATURES

- THE CLASSIC TUDOR MANSION – Play the beloved original board game, now rendered in stunning 3D animation and entirely ad-free! 
- A BRAND-NEW GAME MODE – Exclusive to the digital version of Clue/Cluedo, Ultimate Detective Mode lets you interrogate multiple characters at once.
- MULTIPLE MODES – Compete against cutting-edge AI opponents that adapt to your skill level for the perfect game, or challenge detectives around the world. 
- ADDITIONAL ORIGINAL CONTENT – What happened after the shocking events of Tudor Mansion? Find out in a series of original new crime scenes designed specifically for the digital version of Clue/Cluedo! New characters emerge, bringing with them new clues, motives and case files to consider as you travel around the world in search of the truth. 

Sharpen your mind with the iconic murder-mystery board game, now available on mobile!

hk.description:
靠窗還是靠走道？吧台還是桌子？獨自坐在角落，還是成為聚會的風雲人物？在《這位子形不形？》的世界，你需要依照大家的喜好安排位子。這款邏輯益智遊戲氛圍輕鬆、毫無壓力，誰待在哪裡，全由你來決定。

電影院、擁擠公車、婚宴、窄小計程車，每個場景都會引入具有特定偏好的新角色。聚會上有些客人鼻子很靈，不願意坐在噴了太多古龍水的陌生人旁邊。公車上有些乘客想小睡片刻，不希望旁邊有人大聲播放音樂。仔細觀察現場的所有角色，設法安排最合適的位子！

一心想進入影劇圈發展的納特，在大銀幕上看到跟自己一模一樣的演員之後，生活發生了翻天覆地的變化。納特就此踏上全球之旅，就是為了認識那個主角，還有設法在理想中找到容身之處。跟隨納特的腳步走過一座座城市，感受其心路歷程，並體驗不同的關卡、角色和魅力。

- 為各有偏好的角色安排合適位子。
- 探索角色各不相同的特點，有的似曾相識，有的莫名其妙，有的則介於兩者之間。
- 沒有計時，也沒有排行榜，只要輕鬆享受解謎的成就感。
- 只要推進遊戲，就能陸續解鎖有趣的新場景，例如公車、宴會等！

《帕夏星球：重生》是台灣獨立遊戲團隊——藍蠍遊戲的初試啼聲之作。獨樹一格的療癒手繪場景、輕鬆的推理風格、圍繞著日常展開的遊戲主線，都將帶給玩家不同於以往的沉浸式解謎體驗。

【遊戲概要】
故事發生在遙遠的帕夏星。那裡有座位於地底的繁榮城市，住著一群可愛的汪星人。他們過著日復一日的和平生活，享受著科技帶來的便利。然而，從小在城中長大的主角波比卻時常幻想著走出封閉的地下城，去看看外頭的世界。而遊戲主線正是由此展開的。玩家將會化身波比，在看似平靜安逸，實際上卻面臨能源耗竭危機的城市裡探索，透過挑戰層層關卡，解開最終謎團，在災難來臨前找出拯救所有居民的方法！

hk.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact:

這是模擬？管理遊戲？戰術挑戰？視覺小說？謎題？全部都是，還不止！

深入獨一無二的故事推動體驗。
歡迎來到夏普伍德，一個寒冷而嚴酷的邊境小鎮，充滿了暴力，沒有人是完全無辜的。這個城鎮是走私者、幫派和尖叫的民粹主義者的老巢。為了維護和平與秩序，年輕的警長莉莉·裡德（莎拉·漢密爾頓）不得不與逃犯傑克·博伊德（喬恩·聖約翰）合作，並祈禱她的危險計畫不會失控。

掌管警長的部門。
你的下屬不僅僅是一些資源，他們是有各自長處、弱點、恐懼和偏見的活人 - 為了存活，你必須應對所有這些人。你的人喝得太多了嗎？或者總是有不上班的藉口？還是他拒絕遵守命令？如果想在這個部門維持紀律，你必須施展堅定的手腕。

參與戰術戰鬥。
在最危險的操作中，遊戲將切換到回合制戰鬥。召集你最好的員警團隊。仔細研究地形，調整計畫，悄悄接近嫌疑人並使用非致命武器和裝備 - 如果情況允許的話。沒錯，有時槍戰幾乎是不可避免的，但要小心：“This Is the Police 2”遊戲沒有生命值。一顆子彈就可能讓員警喪命。

成為一名真正的偵探。
收集證據，研究案件材料，審問嫌犯並將罪犯送上法庭。如果嫌疑人是無辜的？也許是時候看看是否可以收買夏普伍德的法官。

《Subnautica》是一款設定在外星海洋星球上的水下冒險遊戲。這個龐大又充滿驚奇和危險的開放世界，等你來探索！

在生存模式下挑戰自我，或切換到自由模式或創意模式，無需擔心水、食物或氧氣的壓力，輕鬆探索這顆海洋星球。

特色

• 探索——在潛入高聳的海帶森林、陽光照耀的高原、生物發光的珊瑚礁和蜿蜒的洞穴系統時，管理你的飢餓、口渴和氧氣供應。
• 搜刮——收集周圍海洋中的資源。深入探險以找到更稀有的資源，讓你能夠製作更先進的物品。
• 製作——建造基地供你避難，製造載具供你駕駛，製作生存工具幫助你在這個水下世界中導航和適應。

Burgle your way to adventure in the award-winning board game!


A New Adventure Begins!
Clank!, the iconic deck-building board game adventure, challenges daring thieves to sneak into a dragon’s lair, steal one of her precious artifacts, and escape – before you’re roasted to a crisp!
Winning fans and awards around the world, Clank! is one of the most-beloved modern board games, with a wide range of expansions and adaptations for players to enjoy.

How Deep will you Delve?
The deeper you go, the more valuable treasures you’ll find…but the harder it will be to escape! So be quick and be quiet: One false step and – CLANK! Each careless sound risks drawing the dragon’s attention.
You’re competing against your fellow thieves to claim the most valuable prize…but you can only enjoy your loot if you make it out of the depths alive!


Choose Your Path
You’ll need a good pair of boots, a sharp sword, and all your roguish skills to survive in the dungeon. Along the way, you’ll acquire new items, abilities, and allies that will help you achieve victory!
Blending deck-building and exploration, Clank! offers a unique dungeon-delving adventure each time you play."


Many Ways to Play
Learn the ropes in a guided Tutorial, then hone your abilities by collecting Achievements and completing Challenges. Play cross-platform against friends, or compete in exciting new Heists that put you up against players from around the world!

However you choose to enter the dungeon: Good luck!...you’re going to need it!

mo.description:
靠窗還是靠走道？吧台還是桌子？獨自坐在角落，還是成為聚會的風雲人物？在《這位子形不形？》的世界，你需要依照大家的喜好安排位子。這款邏輯益智遊戲氛圍輕鬆、毫無壓力，誰待在哪裡，全由你來決定。

電影院、擁擠公車、婚宴、窄小計程車，每個場景都會引入具有特定偏好的新角色。聚會上有些客人鼻子很靈，不願意坐在噴了太多古龍水的陌生人旁邊。公車上有些乘客想小睡片刻，不希望旁邊有人大聲播放音樂。仔細觀察現場的所有角色，設法安排最合適的位子！

一心想進入影劇圈發展的納特，在大銀幕上看到跟自己一模一樣的演員之後，生活發生了翻天覆地的變化。納特就此踏上全球之旅，就是為了認識那個主角，還有設法在理想中找到容身之處。跟隨納特的腳步走過一座座城市，感受其心路歷程，並體驗不同的關卡、角色和魅力。

- 為各有偏好的角色安排合適位子。
- 探索角色各不相同的特點，有的似曾相識，有的莫名其妙，有的則介於兩者之間。
- 沒有計時，也沒有排行榜，只要輕鬆享受解謎的成就感。
- 只要推進遊戲，就能陸續解鎖有趣的新場景，例如公車、宴會等！

故事發生在遙遠的帕夏星。那裡有座位於地底的繁榮城市，住著一群可愛的汪星人。他們過著日復一日的和平生活，享受著科技帶來的便利。然而，從小在城中長大的主角波比卻時常幻想著走出封閉的地下城，去看看外頭的世界。而遊戲主線正是由此展開的。玩家將會化身波比，在看似平靜安逸，實際上卻面臨能源耗竭危機的城市裡探索，透過挑戰層層關卡，解開最終謎團，在災難來臨前找出拯救所有居民的方法！

mo.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

# Support & Legal #
For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact:

This Is the Police 2是廣受好評的黑色劇“This Is the Police”的續集，你可以在其中酌情解釋法律！運行警長的部門，管理你的員警，調查，審問和監禁。在這個由故事推動的冒險、戰略和回合制戰術戰鬥混合遊戲中，做出艱難的決定 - 並儘量避免自己入獄！

這是模擬？管理遊戲？戰術挑戰？視覺小說？謎題？全部都是，還不止！

深入獨一無二的故事推動體驗。
歡迎來到夏普伍德，一個寒冷而嚴酷的邊境小鎮，充滿了暴力，沒有人是完全無辜的。這個城鎮是走私者、幫派和尖叫的民粹主義者的老巢。為了維護和平與秩序，年輕的警長莉莉·裡德（莎拉·漢密爾頓）不得不與逃犯傑克·博伊德（喬恩·聖約翰）合作，並祈禱她的危險計畫不會失控。

掌管警長的部門。
你的下屬不僅僅是一些資源，他們是有各自長處、弱點、恐懼和偏見的活人 - 為了存活，你必須應對所有這些人。你的人喝得太多了嗎？或者總是有不上班的藉口？還是他拒絕遵守命令？如果想在這個部門維持紀律，你必須施展堅定的手腕。

參與戰術戰鬥。
在最危險的操作中，遊戲將切換到回合制戰鬥。召集你最好的員警團隊。仔細研究地形，調整計畫，悄悄接近嫌疑人並使用非致命武器和裝備 - 如果情況允許的話。沒錯，有時槍戰幾乎是不可避免的，但要小心：“This Is the Police 2”遊戲沒有生命值。一顆子彈就可能讓員警喪命。

成為一名真正的偵探。
收集證據，研究案件材料，審問嫌犯並將罪犯送上法庭。如果嫌疑人是無辜的？也許是時候看看是否可以收買夏普伍德的法官。

《Subnautica》是一款設定在外星海洋星球上的水下冒險遊戲。這個龐大又充滿驚奇和危險的開放世界，等你來探索！

潛入深海、製作裝備、駕駛潛艇，並巧妙應對野生生物，探索茂密的珊瑚礁、火山、洞穴系統等多樣環境——同時努力生存下去。揭開這個充滿生物世界的神祕面紗，這些生物有的親近友好，有的則充滿敵意，且到處散落著過去的線索。

在生存模式下挑戰自我，或切換到自由模式或創意模式，無需擔心水、食物或氧氣的壓力，輕鬆探索這顆海洋星球。

特色
• 求生——在廣大的水下星球迫降後，時間緊迫，必須尋找水和食物，並開發裝備來探索這個世界。
• 探索——在潛入高聳的海帶森林、陽光照耀的高原、生物發光的珊瑚礁和蜿蜒的洞穴系統時，管理你的飢餓、口渴和氧氣供應。
• 搜刮——收集周圍海洋中的資源。深入探險以找到更稀有的資源，讓你能夠製作更先進的物品。
• 製作——建造基地供你避難，製造載具供你駕駛，製作生存工具幫助你在這個水下世界中導航和適應。
• 發現——這個星球發生了什麼事？是什麼導致你墜毀？你能找到方法活著離開這個星球嗎？
• 自訂——在生存模式下挑戰自我，或切換到自由模式或創意模式，無需擔心水、食物或氧氣的壓力，輕鬆探索這顆海洋星球。

Burgle your way to adventure in the award-winning board game!


A New Adventure Begins!
Clank!, the iconic deck-building board game adventure, challenges daring thieves to sneak into a dragon’s lair, steal one of her precious artifacts, and escape – before you’re roasted to a crisp!

The deeper you go, the more valuable treasures you’ll find…but the harder it will be to escape! So be quick and be quiet: One false step and – CLANK! Each careless sound risks drawing the dragon’s attention.

Blending deck-building and exploration, Clank! offers a unique dungeon-delving adventure each time you play."

Learn the ropes in a guided Tutorial, then hone your abilities by collecting Achievements and completing Challenges. Play cross-platform against friends, or compete in exciting new Heists that put you up against players from around the world!

tw.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

This Is the Police 2是廣受好評的黑色劇“This Is the Police”的續集，你可以在其中酌情解釋法律！運行警長的部門，管理你的員警，調查，審問和監禁。在這個由故事推動的冒險、戰略和回合制戰術戰鬥混合遊戲中，做出艱難的決定 - 並儘量避免自己入獄！

這是模擬？管理遊戲？戰術挑戰？視覺小說？謎題？全部都是，還不止！

深入獨一無二的故事推動體驗。
歡迎來到夏普伍德，一個寒冷而嚴酷的邊境小鎮，充滿了暴力，沒有人是完全無辜的。這個城鎮是走私者、幫派和尖叫的民粹主義者的老巢。為了維護和平與秩序，年輕的警長莉莉·裡德（莎拉·漢密爾頓）不得不與逃犯傑克·博伊德（喬恩·聖約翰）合作，並祈禱她的危險計畫不會失控。

掌管警長的部門。
你的下屬不僅僅是一些資源，他們是有各自長處、弱點、恐懼和偏見的活人 - 為了存活，你必須應對所有這些人。你的人喝得太多了嗎？或者總是有不上班的藉口？還是他拒絕遵守命令？如果想在這個部門維持紀律，你必須施展堅定的手腕。

參與戰術戰鬥。
在最危險的操作中，遊戲將切換到回合制戰鬥。召集你最好的員警團隊。仔細研究地形，調整計畫，悄悄接近嫌疑人並使用非致命武器和裝備 - 如果情況允許的話。沒錯，有時槍戰幾乎是不可避免的，但要小心：“This Is the Police 2”遊戲沒有生命值。一顆子彈就可能讓員警喪命。

成為一名真正的偵探。
收集證據，研究案件材料，審問嫌犯並將罪犯送上法庭。如果嫌疑人是無辜的？也許是時候看看是否可以收買夏普伍德的法官。

• 探索——在潛入高聳的海帶森林、陽光照耀的高原、生物發光的珊瑚礁和蜿蜒的洞穴系統時，管理你的飢餓、口渴和氧氣供應。

• 製作——建造基地供你避難，製造載具供你駕駛，製作生存工具幫助你在這個水下世界中導航和適應。
• 發現——這個星球發生了什麼事？是什麼導致你墜毀？你能找到方法活著離開這個星球嗎？
• 自訂——在生存模式下挑戰自我，或切換到自由模式或創意模式，無需擔心水、食物或氧氣的壓力，輕鬆探索這顆海洋星球。

us.description:
Burgle your way to adventure in the award-winning board game!


A New Adventure Begins!
Clank!, the iconic deck-building board game adventure, challenges daring thieves to sneak into a dragon’s lair, steal one of her precious artifacts, and escape – before you’re roasted to a crisp!
Winning fans and awards around the world, Clank! is one of the most-beloved modern board games, with a wide range of expansions and adaptations for players to enjoy.

How Deep will you Delve?
The deeper you go, the more valuable treasures you’ll find…but the harder it will be to escape! So be quick and be quiet: One false step and – CLANK! Each careless sound risks drawing the dragon’s attention.
You’re competing against your fellow thieves to claim the most valuable prize…but you can only enjoy your loot if you make it out of the depths alive!


Choose Your Path
You’ll need a good pair of boots, a sharp sword, and all your roguish skills to survive in the dungeon. Along the way, you’ll acquire new items, abilities, and allies that will help you achieve victory!
Blending deck-building and exploration, Clank! offers a unique dungeon-delving adventure each time you play."


Many Ways to Play
Learn the ropes in a guided Tutorial, then hone your abilities by collecting Achievements and completing Challenges. Play cross-platform against friends, or compete in exciting new Heists that put you up against players from around the world!

However you choose to enter the dungeon: Good luck!...you’re going to need it!

us.description:
Window seat or aisle? Booth or table? Lone wolf or life of the party? In Is This Seat Taken?, your mission is to organize groups of people according to their preferences. It’s a cozy, no-pressure logic puzzle game where you’re in charge of who sits where.

Whether it’s the cinema, a crowded bus, a wedding reception, or a cramped taxi cab, every setting introduces new characters with specific tastes. A party guest with a sensitive nose won’t be happy sitting next to a stranger who’s wearing too much cologne. A sleepy passenger won’t be happy trying to nap on the bus next to someone listening to loud music. It’s all about reading the room to find the perfect placement!

Nat is an aspiring actor whose world gets turned upside down when they see a shape just like them on the big screen. This discovery sends Nat on a global journey to meet their hero and figure out how to fit in. Experience Nat's heartfelt story as you travel from city to city, each with its own levels, characters, and charm.

- Play seating matchmaker to please picky characters.
- Discover each character’s unique traits—relatable, outlandish, and everything in between.
- Piece together satisfying puzzles with no timers or leaderboards.
- Unlock fun new scenarios as you progress—from bus rides to banquets!

“Pasha Planet: Reborn” is the debut game of Scorpio Game, a Taiwanese independent game development studio. Prepare to be charmed by unique hand-painted scenes and have fun with light detective work, players will get to explore the main game plot that revolves around the characters’ daily life through an immersive and one-of-a-kind puzzle-solving gameplay.

[Game Overview]
 The story takes place on the distant planet of Pasha. A prosperous underground city, which are inhabited by adorable doggies, can be found there. They live in peace day after day, enjoying the convenience brought about by technology. However, the protagonist Bobbie, who grew up in the city, often fantasizes about getting out of the closed-off Underground City to see the world outside. This is where the main story line of the game begins. Players will take on the role of Bobbie and explore the seemingly calm and peaceful city, which is in actual fact, facing an energy crisis. Players must clear stages of challenges to solve the final mystery and figure out a way to save all the inhabitants before disaster strikes!

[Game Features]
- Created by an independent game development studio in Taiwan.
- Classic click-and-point puzzle-solving gameplay.
- Charming and heartwarming hand-painted scenes.
- Challenging puzzles and stages.

About:
Dungeon and Puzzles is a game that challenges players' 2D spatial perception and logical thinking. A player can use a sword to attack monsters, or a bow and an arrow to destroy enemies from afar. Pushing the obstacles back with a shield and pulling the monsters with a pair of special gloves.

There are 150 handcrafted rooms in the dungeon. Players will have to get a better understanding of the game to solve the puzzles and clear the rooms.

To beat the puzzles with fewer moves, achieving advanced goals, players will have to try different tactics and move combinations to find an optimized solution for the room. Sometimes a player would need to put the old solution aside and take on a new perspective towards the problem, reexamine and rethink before making a move.

Features:
● Dungeon + Puzzle + Sokoban
● 150 handcrafted rooms
● Fantasy themed pixel art
● Non-linear dungeon map

Interpret the law as you see fit in This Is the Police 2, sequel to the acclaimed noir drama This Is the Police! Run the sheriff’s department, manage your cops, investigate, interrogate, and incarcerate. Make tough decisions – and try to keep out of prison yourself! – in this story-driven mixture of adventure, strategy, and turn-based tactical combat.

Is it a simulation? A management game? A tactical challenge? A visual novel? A puzzle? It’s all of these, and more!

Dive into one-of-a-kind -story-driven experience.
Welcome to Sharpwood, a cold and harsh border town riven with violence, where no one is completely innocent. Smugglers, gangs, and screaming populists call this town their home. To maintain peace and order, the young sheriff Lilly Reed (Sarah Hamilton) will have to team up with fugitive criminal Jack Boyd (Jon St. John), and pray that her dangerous plan doesn’t spiral out of control.

Take charge of the Sheriff’s department.
Your subordinates aren’t just some resource; they are living people with their own strengths, weaknesses, fears, and prejudices – and you'll have to reckon with all of them in order to survive. Is one of your guys drinking too much? Or always coming up with excuses for not coming to work? Or does he refuse to follow orders? You’ll have to show a steady hand if you want to impose discipline on this department.

Engage in tactical combat.
During your most dangerous operations, the game will switch to turn-based combat. Gather a team of your finest cops. Carefully study the terrain, adapt your plans, stealthily approach your suspects and use non-lethal weapons and equipment – if the situation allows. True, sometimes gunfights are almost impossible to avoid, but be careful: This Is the Police 2 doesn’t have hit points. A single bullet can cost a cop their life.

Become a true detective.
Collect evidence, study case materials, interrogate suspects and send the criminals to court. And if the suspect was innocent? Perhaps it's time to find out if any Sharpwood judges can be bought.

Thank you for playing ‘THIS IS THE POLICE 2’!

us.description:
这是一款关于生、死、心愿与延续的App。

小时候，我以为自己是不会老去的彼得·潘，却终究敌不过健康磨损，容颜老去。
时针转动，生命流逝，但每一次心跳都可以更加有力。

有时候，生命只是一连串的数字，多少年，多少月，多少小时，多少分钟。当你意识到这个时，往往陷入巨大的虚无感之中，惶恐不能自拔。
而现在，这些数字可以成为你重塑生命的坐标，指引你走向更健康、更长久的未来。

生辰 2.0 通过 AI 分析和科学判断，不仅预测生命的终点，更为你铺就延长生命的道路：

- 探索你的生命时钟：了解当下的预期寿命，直面生命的有限与珍贵。
- 发现延寿的可能：看见改变健康习惯能为你带来多少额外的生命时光。
- 聚合健康数据：自动追踪睡眠、锻炼、压力（HRV）、经期、喝水等十余种健康数据

美国诗人纳·斯待尔在87岁那年写道：
"如果我能够从头活过，我会试着犯更多的错。
我会放松一点，我会灵活一点。
我会爬更多的山，游更多的河，看更多的日落。"

因为了解生命的终点，才能更好地珍惜当下的每一刻。生辰2.0 探索健康的可能，让我们成为你健康旅程的长久伙伴。

订阅周期：1个月、3个月、12个月

*Make sure to check if your device is supported before playing Subnautica!*

Subnautica is an underwater adventure game set on an alien ocean planet. A massive, open world full of wonder and peril awaits you!

Descend into the depths, craft equipment, pilot submarines and out-smart wildlife to explore lush coral reefs, volcanoes, cave systems, and more - all while trying to survive. Unravel the mystery of this world teeming with creatures, both friendly and hostile, scattered with clues from a previous time.

Play in Survival mode to experience the original challenge, or switch to Freedom or Creative mode to discover this oceanic planet without the pressures of thirst, hunger, or oxygen. 

FEATURES
• SURVIVE - After crash landing on a vast underwater planet, the clock is ticking to find water, food, and to develop the equipment you need to explore.
• EXPLORE - Manage your hunger, thirst, and oxygen supply as you dive into towering kelp forests, sunlit plateaus, bio-luminescent reefs, and winding cave systems.
• SCAVENGE - Collect resources from the ocean around you. Venture deeper and further to find rarer resources, allowing you to craft more advanced items.
• CRAFT - Build bases to shelter in, vehicles to pilot, tools for survival to aid you in navigating and adapting to this subaquatic landscape. 
• DISCOVER - What happened to this planet? What caused you to crash? Can you find a way to make it off the planet alive?
• CUSTOMIZE - Play in Survival mode to experience the original challenge, or switch to Freedom or Creative mode to discover this oceanic planet without the pressures of thirst, hunger, or oxygen. 

CAREFULLY REDESIGNED FOR MOBILE
• Revamped interface – exclusive mobile UI with complete touch control
• Game Center achievements

Interpret the law as you see fit in This Is the Police 2, sequel to the acclaimed noir drama This Is the Police! Run the sheriff’s department, manage your cops, investigate, interrogate, and incarcerate. Make tough decisions – and try to keep out of prison yourself! – in this story-driven mixture of adventure, strategy, and turn-based tactical combat.

Is it a simulation? A management game? A tactical challenge? A visual novel? A puzzle? It’s all of these, and more!

Dive into one-of-a-kind -story-driven experience.
Welcome to Sharpwood, a cold and harsh border town riven with violence, where no one is completely innocent. Smugglers, gangs, and screaming populists call this town their home. To maintain peace and order, the young sheriff Lilly Reed (Sarah Hamilton) will have to team up with fugitive criminal Jack Boyd (Jon St. John), and pray that her dangerous plan doesn’t spiral out of control.

Take charge of the Sheriff’s department.
Your subordinates aren’t just some resource; they are living people with their own strengths, weaknesses, fears, and prejudices – and you'll have to reckon with all of them in order to survive. Is one of your guys drinking too much? Or always coming up with excuses for not coming to work? Or does he refuse to follow orders? You’ll have to show a steady hand if you want to impose discipline on this department.

Engage in tactical combat.
During your most dangerous operations, the game will switch to turn-based combat. Gather a team of your finest cops. Carefully study the terrain, adapt your plans, stealthily approach your suspects and use non-lethal weapons and equipment – if the situation allows. True, sometimes gunfights are almost impossible to avoid, but be careful: This Is the Police 2 doesn’t have hit points. A single bullet can cost a cop their life.

Become a true detective.
Collect evidence, study case materials, interrogate suspects and send the criminals to court. And if the suspect was innocent? Perhaps it's time to find out if any Sharpwood judges can be bought.

Thank you for playing ‘THIS IS THE POLICE 2’!

Rotaeno is a heart-pounding, thumb-tapping, wrist-flicking rhythm game that fully utilizes your device's gyroscope for an unprecedented musical experience.
Rotate your device to hit notes as you soar through the stars. Drop into your headphones and immerse yourself in the kick beats and stellar synths of this astronautical adventure!

What sets Rotaeno apart is all in the name - rotation! Building on the basic controls of more traditional rhythm games, Rotaeno includes notes that require smooth turns and rapid rotations to hit, making it feel like you're drifting in a highspeed interstellar stunt race. It's a real arcade experience - in the palm of your hand!

tr.description:
Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters.
Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes.
Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow.

# Core Features #
DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS
- Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals
- High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded

REAL-TIME EVENT LOG
- Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions
- Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment

COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING
- Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality

# Fully Customizable for Your Practice #
CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES
- Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms

FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS
Configure the app as a simple CPR timer
Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour

# First Responder & Post-Code Tools #
FIRST RESPONDER MODE
- Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest
- Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map

CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT
- Save previous codes
- Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review

# Evidence-Based Flowcharts #
ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES
- Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts
- Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines

# Built for Healthcare Professionals #
Designed for use in:
- Emergency Departments
- ICUs
- Wards
- Prehospital and first-responder settings

Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation.

Subnautica is an underwater adventure game set on an alien ocean planet. A massive, open world full of wonder and peril awaits you!

Descend into the depths, craft equipment, pilot submarines and out-smart wildlife to explore lush coral reefs, volcanoes, cave systems, and more - all while trying to survive. Unravel the mystery of this world teeming with creatures, both friendly and hostile, scattered with clues from a previous time.

Play in Survival mode to experience the original challenge, or switch to Freedom or Creative mode to discover this oceanic planet without the pressures of thirst, hunger, or oxygen. 

FEATURES
• SURVIVE - After crash landing on a vast underwater planet, the clock is ticking to find water, food, and to develop the equipment you need to explore.
• EXPLORE - Manage your hunger, thirst, and oxygen supply as you dive into towering kelp forests, sunlit plateaus, bio-luminescent reefs, and winding cave systems.
• SCAVENGE - Collect resources from the ocean around you. Venture deeper and further to find rarer resources, allowing you to craft more advanced items.
• CRAFT - Build bases to shelter in, vehicles to pilot, tools for survival to aid you in navigating and adapting to this subaquatic landscape.

Lugar à janela ou no corredor? Cabine ou mesa? Bicho do mato ou alma da festa? Em Is This Seat Taken?, a tua missão é organizar grupos de formas de acordo com as suas preferências. É um jogo de quebra-cabeças lógico, acolhedor e sem pressão, onde és responsável por decidir quem se senta onde.

Seja no cinema, num autocarro lotado, numa festa de casamento ou num táxi apertado, cada ambiente apresenta novas personagens com gostos específicos. Um convidado de uma festa com um olfato sensível não ficará feliz sentado ao lado de um estranho que esteja a usar demasiado perfume. Um passageiro ensonado não ficará feliz a tentar dormir no autocarro ao lado de alguém que esteja a ouvir música alta. É tudo uma questão de ler a sala para encontrar o lugar perfeito!

Nat quer representar e o seu mundo é virado de pernas para o ar quando vê uma forma igual a si no grande ecrã. Esta descoberta leva Nat a embarcar numa viagem pelo mundo para conhecer o seu ídolo e descobrir como se integrar. Vive a comovente história de Nat enquanto viajas de cidade em cidade, cada uma com os seus próprios níveis, personagens e charme.

- Descobre as características únicas de cada personagem: simples, excêntricas, tudo o que possas imaginar.

 The story takes place on the distant planet of Pasha. A prosperous underground city, which are inhabited by adorable doggies, can be found there. Interpreta a lei como entenderes em This is the Police 2, a sequela do aclamado drama noir "This Is the Police!". Administra a esquadra do xerife, gere os teus agentes, investiga, interroga e prende. Toma decisões difíceis - e tenta permanecer fora da prisão! - nesta mistura de aventura, estratégia e combate tático por turnos.

É uma simulação? Um jogo de gestão? Um desafio tático? Um romance visual? Um enigma? É tudo isto e muito mais!

Envolve-te numa experiência única guiada pela história.
Bem-vindo a Sharpwood. Uma cidade fronteiriça fria e agreste dilacerada pela violência, onde ninguém é completamente inocente. Contrabandistas, gangues e populistas radicais  dizem que esta cidade é a sua casa. Para manter a paz e a ordem, a jovem xerife Lilly Reed (Sarah Hamilton) terá que se juntar ao criminoso fugitivo Jack Boyd (Jon St. John) e rezar para que o seu perigoso plano não se descontrole.

Assume o comando da esquadra do xerife.
Os teus subordinados não são uns meros recursos; são pessoas comuns com as suas próprias forças, fraquezas, medos e preconceitos - e terás que contar com todos para sobreviveres. Alguém anda a beber demais? Ou arranja sempre desculpas para faltar ao trabalho? Ou recusa-se a cumprir ordens? Terás que mostrar mão firme se quiseres impor disciplina nesta esquadra.

Envolve-te em combate tático.
Durante as tuas operações mais perigosas, o jogo muda para o combate por turnos. Reúne uma equipa com os teus melhores agentes. Estuda cuidadosamente o terreno, ajusta os teus planos, aproxima-te furtivamente dos teus suspeitos e usa armas e equipamentos não letais - se a situação permitir. Mas como nem sempre é possível evitar os tiroteios tem cuidado: "This Is the Police 2" não tem pontos de vida. Uma simples bala pode custar a vida a um polícia.

Sê um verdadeiro detetive.
Recolhe indícios, estuda provas, interroga suspeitos e manda os criminosos para tribunal. E se o suspeito era inocente? Talvez esteja na hora de descobrir se algum juiz de Sharpwood pode ser comprado.

pt.description:
Vivencie as batalhas da Segunda Guerra Mundial neste novo jogo de guerra!

A batalha continua após o "1941 Frozen Front" - e desta vez, tudo gira em torno de batalhas navais! Entre para a Marinha e lute para vencer a maior batalha da sua vida! Conquiste o campo de batalha e envie seus soldados para a linha de frente. O melhor do combate militar! Escolha as melhores táticas e utilize seu esquadrão para derrotar o inimigo! Lidere o exército dos EUA em sua campanha ou comande as forças japonesas em sua missão! Elimine as alianças inimigas com infantaria, artilharia, tanques, aviões de combate, fragatas e submarinos, e ganhe suas patentes por ser um comandante habilidoso no FRONT DO PACÍFICO!

*** DESCRIÇÃO DA MISSÃO ***

BATALHE com armas poderosas como torpedos e bombas!
ELIMINE posições inimigas com tanques e infantaria!
BOMBARDEIE quartéis generais inimigos com poderosos bombardeiros!
SURPREENDA o inimigo com ataques de seus submarinos
POSICIONE sua artilharia em terrenos acidentados!
LIBERE praias, lagos e estreitos!
PREPARE EMBOSCADAS para o inimigo!
ABASTEÇA seu exército com suprimentos e munição!
DEFENDA seus porta-aviões e suas fragatas!

Recursos:
- Jogue sem anúncios!
- Jogo de ação e estratégia em rodadas, no ambiente da 2ª Guerra Mundial
- Campanhas eletrizantes e missões desafiadoras
- Unidades históricas dos EUA e do Japão
- Infantaria, artilharia, tanques, caças, fragatas e submarinos nas duas alianças
- Reparos, camuflagem e fortificação de unidades durante as batalhas
- Batalhas multiplayer hot-hand
- Mapa hexagonal para proporcionar a melhor perspectiva possível
- Gráficos detalhados e efeitos sonoros super realistas

Obrigado por jogar o "1942 Pacific Front"!

pt.description:
Desenvolvido para instituições, profissionais e alunos que buscam otimizar as manobras de RCP durante uma PCR. O timer foi elaborado e amplamente testado para ter um layout prático, rápido e intuitivo, mesmo no cenário agitado e de elevado estresse de uma PCR.
 
Funções:
- 2 CHRONÔMETROS: timer com 2 relógios distintos para COMPRESSÕES TORÁCICAS e EPINEFRINA, com feedback visual amplo quando excedidos os limites de tempo 
- CUSTOMIZÁVEL: permite adicionar medicamentos, procedimentos e ritmos da sua escolha, separados por categorias
- MÚLTIPLOS AJUSTES disponíveis para o Code Blue se adequar às suas preferências
- MODO FIRST RESPONDER: para aqueles que prestam primeiro atendimento em ambiente extra-hospitalar, opção para salvar as coordenadas dos atendimentos e visualizar no mapa interativa. 
- FLUXOGRAMAS: fluxogramas interativas com as recomendações presentes nos principais guidelines para RCP / PCR do AHA ACLS e ERC. 
- LOG/TIMELINE: resumo prontamente disponível em layout de fácil visualização acessível durante a ocorrência, permitindo manter total controle mesmo em uma PCR complexa de longa duração
- HISTÓRICO: histórico de atendimentos com resumo e indicadores de qualidade de assistência, permitindo revisão e aprimoramento dos atendimentos por equipes e seus gestores
- RELATÓRIO PDF: relatório em PDF com resumo e timeline completo

pt.description:
*Confira se o seu dispositivo é suportado antes de jogar Subnautica!*

Subnautica é um jogo de aventura subaquática ambientado em um planeta oceânico alienígena. Um mundo aberto enorme repleto de maravilhas e perigos está à sua espera!

Mergulhe nas profundezas, fabrique equipamentos, pilote submarinos e supere a vida selvagem para explorar recifes de corais, vulcões, sistemas de cavernas e muito mais — tudo enquanto tenta sobreviver. Desvende o mistério deste mundo repleto de criaturas, tanto amigáveis quanto hostis, com pistas de uma era passada.

Jogue no modo de sobrevivência e vivencie o desafio original ou troque para o modo de liberdade ou criativo para explorar o planeta oceânico sem a pressão da sede, da fome ou do oxigênio. 

RECURSOS
• SOBREVIVA — Após cair em um vasto planeta subaquático, você corre contra o tempo para encontrar comida, água e para desenvolver os equipamentos necessários para explorar.
• EXPLORE — Gerencie fome, sede e fornecimento de oxigênio conforme mergulha nas enormes florestas de alga, nos planaltos iluminados pelo sol, nos recifes bioluminescentes e sistemas de caverna enormes.
• SUCATEIE — Colete recursos do oceano à sua volta. Aventure-se ainda mais nas profundezas para encontrar recursos mais raros, permitindo a fabricação de itens avançados.
• FABRIQUE — Crie bases para se abrigar, veículos para pilotar, ferramentas de sobrevivência para auxiliar na navegação e na adaptação a este cenário subaquático. 
• DESCUBRA — O que aconteceu com o planeta? O que causou o seu acidente? Você consegue achar uma saída deste planeta sem morrer?
• PERSONALIZE — Jogue no modo de sobrevivência e vivencie o desafio original ou troque para o modo de liberdade ou criativo para explorar o planeta oceânico sem a pressão da sede, da fome ou do oxigênio.

CUIDADOSAMENTE REPROJETADO PARA DISPOSITIVOS MÓVEIS
• Interface reformulada — IU móvel exclusiva com controle de toque completo
• Conquistas do Game Center
• Salvamento na nuvem — compartilhe o progresso entre dispositivos iOS
• Compatível com controles MFi
• Otimização para iPhone 16 (incluindo Pro Max)
